Risk Description: Some error messages are generic and may confuse users.
Mitigation / Recommendation: Improve validation copy and provide specific corrective guidance.

Risk Description: Responsive tables may require horizontal scrolling on small devices.
Mitigation / Recommendation: Add responsive card layout or reduce table columns on mobile.

Risk Description: Keyboard focus indicator is not strong enough on all controls.
Mitigation / Recommendation: Increase focus outline visibility for buttons, links, and inputs.

Risk Description: No automated regression suite is documented for release verification.
Mitigation / Recommendation: Add smoke/regression checklist to future release cycles.

Risk Description: Performance has only been reviewed manually, not with load testing.
Mitigation / Recommendation: Run Lighthouse or performance profiling before high-traffic release.
